name: GT-jb-submult
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2312 --- 3.1.3 Jordan Banach algebra norm axiom, VERBATIM: "$$||a \circ b|| \leq ||a|| \, ||b||, \qquad a, b \in A.$$". B(H)_sa is a JB algebra (GT-bhsa-jc + GT-jc-is-jb) in the operator norm, so its AMBIENT Jordan product satisfies submultiplicativity in operator norm. Used only for crude norm bounds in JB4 setup; NOT for the eps-C* product (which uses ax_prodnorm instead).
